en: Zazu! Yes, sire?
Take Nala home. I've got to teach my son a lesson.
Come, Nala. Simba, good luck.
Simba! Simba!
Simba, I'm very disappointed in you. I know.
ko: 심바. 매우 실망했다. 알아요. 죽을 수도 있었어. 일부러 내 말을 안 들었지.

en: You could have been killed. You deliberately disobeyed me.
ko: 심바. 매우 실망했다. 알아요. 죽을 수도 있었어. 일부러 내 말을 안 들었지.

en: And what's worse, you put Nala in danger.
ko: 더 나쁜 건 날라를 위험에 빠뜨렸어.

en: I was just trying to be brave like you.
ko: 그냥 아빠처럼 용감하고 싶었어요. 꼭 필요할 때만 용감한 거야.

en: I'm only brave when I have to be.
ko: 그냥 아빠처럼 용감하고 싶었어요. 꼭 필요할 때만 용감한 거야.

en: Simba, being brave doesn't mean you go looking for trouble.
ko: 심바, 용감하다고 위험을 찾아다니는 게 아니야. 근데 아빠는 아무것도 안 무서워하잖아요.

en: But you're not scared of anything. I was today.
You were? Yes. I thought I might lose you.
ko: 오늘은 무서웠어. 무서웠다고요? 응 널 잃을 뻔했으니까.

en: I guess even kings get scared, huh?
But you know what? What?
I think those hyenas were even scareder.
Because nobody messes with your dad. Come here, you!
Oh, no! No! Come here!
Gotcha!
Dad, we're pals, right? Right.
And we'll always be together, right?
Simba, let me tell you something that my father told me.
Look at the stars.
The great kings of the past look down on us from those stars.
Really? Yes.
So whenever you feel alone, just remember that those kings will always be there to guide you.
And so will I.
